description:
Offered: as needed
The Internship provides an opportunity to gain valuable on-the-job experience for university credit by working in business, government, industry or academia. Students select and apply for field placement with the assistance of the Mathematics Department and Career Services.
Prerequisite(s): Junior or senior standing and approval of the Mathematics Department
Note: An Internship course may be repeated for a maximum of 12 semester hours total. Only 3 internship credits may be used toward mathematics major requirements.
prerequisites: Junior or senior standing and approval of the Mathematics Department
